CREATE TABLE RDF_Graph_Group (GroupName VARCHAR(255), GroupID INT);
CREATE TABLE Additional_Info (GraphURI VARCHAR(255), Metadata VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Additional_Info (GraphURI, Metadata) VALUES ('http://example.com/resource1', 'Info about resource 1');
INSERT INTO Additional_Info (GraphURI, Metadata) VALUES ('http://example.com/resource2', 'Info about resource 2');
DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_INS ('TestGroup', (SELECT GraphURI FROM Additional_Info WHERE Metadata LIKE '%resource%'));
DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_GROUP_INS ('TestGroup', (SELECT GraphURI FROM Additional_Info WHERE GraphURI NOT IN (SELECT GraphURI FROM Additional_Info WHERE Metadata = 'duplicate')));
